name: hideout-editor-monorepo
description: Hideout Editor — a local web app for creating and organizing hideout maps

scripts.check:frontend: npm run frontend:lint && npm run frontend:typecheck && npm run frontend:test && npm run frontend:i18n:check && npm run frontend:build
scripts.check: npm run check:editor-artifacts && npm run check:frontend && npm run check:backend
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run release:zip

author: Hideout Editor contributors
